prompt_text:
### Demographics: 37-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Tamoxifen (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 53.7 kg; Height 168.2 cm; BMI 19.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 143/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.7%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 235mg/dL; 9 months ago 232mg/dL; 6 months ago 180mg/dL; 3 months ago 167mg/dL; current 113mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.3kg; 9 months ago 55.1kg; 6 months ago 51.8kg; 3 months ago 52.3kg; current 53.7kg), Height (12 months ago 168.2cm; 9 months ago 168.2cm; 6 months ago 168.2cm; 3 months ago 168.2cm; current 168.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 19.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 138mmHg; 6 months ago 143mmHg; 3 months ago 140mmHg; current 143mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 91U/L; 9 months ago 85U/L; 6 months ago 82U/L; 3 months ago 79U/L; current 90U/L), AST (12 months ago 64U/L; 9 months ago 63U/L; 6 months ago 53U/L; 3 months ago 56U/L; current 63U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 9.9mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 8.1mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 6.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.6mL/min/1.73m²; current 5mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 382mg/g; 9 months ago 575mg/g; 6 months ago 644mg/g; 3 months ago 680mg/g; current 489mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 72mg/dL; 9 months ago 76mg/dL; 6 months ago 71mg/dL; 3 months ago 71mg/dL; current 73mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 154mg/dL; 9 months ago 136mg/dL; 6 months ago 156mg/dL; 3 months ago 138mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.80 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
